title: PR Agency Retainer Agreement
description: An agency contract for press releases, publisher outreach, media relations, and brand promotion.
whatsCovered: Definition of freelance press releases, news pitching, or editorial coverage
Payment terms, invoice dates, and retainer options
Intellectual property transfer guidelines upon invoice clearance
Late payment interest fees and cancellation notice timelines
Standard governing law and dispute resolution details
whenToUse: Use this contract when you are hired to provide professional press releases, news pitching, or editorial coverage as an independent contractor or agency.

fields.label: Client Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 500 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10022

fields.label: PR Campaign Goals
fields.placeholder: Describe target publications, pitches, or outreach metrics...

clauses.heading: PR AGENCY RETAINER AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {provider_name}, located at {provider_address} ("Provider"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Client").

clauses.heading: 1. Scope of Services
clauses.body: Agency shall author press statements and pitch stories for: {pr_campaign}.

clauses.heading: 2. Payment Covenants
clauses.body: Client shall pay Agency a monthly retainer fee of {monthly_retainer} for PR support.

clauses.heading: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
clauses.body: All press copy, media contact lists, and presentation slides belong to the Client.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I edit this contract after signing?
faq.answer: Yes. Any changes to scope, payment, or timelines require a written amendment signed by both parties.

faq.question: Who pays for third-party hosting or materials?
faq.answer: Under this contract, the client is responsible for purchasing all third-party subscriptions, hosting, and assets directly.
